result: If I could change the world in one way, it would be to ensure universal access to quality education. Education empowers individuals, fosters critical thinking, and opens up opportunities that can lead to improved quality of life. It can also help address issues like poverty, inequality, and conflict by fostering understanding and innovation. A world where everyone has access to education would be more equitable and better equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
